## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Android scaffold
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix

## Testing

Describe how this was tested.

## Security Review

Does this change affect auth, device binding, storage, networking, notifications, approvals, or agent command execution?

- [ ] No security-sensitive behavior changed
- [ ] Yes, security-sensitive behavior changed and the risk is described below

Risk notes:

## Screenshots / Recordings

Add screenshots or recordings for UI changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I updated docs where needed
- [ ] I avoided committing secrets or private data
- [ ] I kept the PR focused and reviewable
